overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 featuring a cowboy character exploring a misty mountain wilderness. The clip begins with the character standing on a rocky overlook, then walking along cliff edges and grassy mountain trails through atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with misty valley view

agents.ego_description: standing motionless on the cliff edge, gazing out at the vast misty valley and distant mountains

entered.detail: gray rocky outcrop where the character stands at the cliff's edge
expansive fog-filled valley with layered mountain ridges fading into the distance
silhouetted mountain peaks visible through the morning mist
sparse evergreen trees dotting the right side of the overlook

segments.scene_description: The character stands still on a rocky mountain overlook, surveying a vast misty valley shrouded in fog. The overcast sky creates a somber, atmospheric mood as the camera slowly pans across the wilderness landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge pathway with rock formations

events.description: character begins walking forward along the cliff edge after standing still
character turns around 180 degrees to face the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the narrow cliff edge before turning around to head toward the mountain trail

entered.detail: massive gray boulder formation beside the path, covered in patches of moss

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along the cliff edge, navigating the rocky terrain before executing a turn. As the character turns, a large rock formation comes into view on the left while the valley vista moves out of sight behind them.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain trail with vertical rock wall

events.description: ground surface transitions from rocky cliff to grassy dirt trail as character enters the mountain path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow grassy trail beside a large rock wall, heading deeper into the foggy wilderness

entered.detail: narrow winding path covered in green grass and dirt, cutting through the mountain terrain
thick patches of tall wild grass lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a grassy mountain trail, walking steadily forward with a massive rock wall running along the left side. The path winds through tall grass and scattered pine trees as the misty atmosphere continues to shroud the distant landscape in fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, atmospheric overlook into a narrow, enclosed mountain trail. It begins with the character standing still on a rocky precipice, surveying a vast valley shrouded in dense fog under a somber, overcast sky. As the character begins to walk along the cliff edge, the camera pivots, causing the expansive vista to slide out of view and bringing a large rock formation into focus on the left. The scene then shifts as the character moves from the rocky ledge onto a grassy trail, where the open horizon is replaced by a massive, looming rock wall. Finally, the path winds forward through tall grass and scattered pine trees, with the persistent mist continuing to veil the distant wilderness.
